description: The SAP Business One Service connector provides APIs for the service module objects of SAP Business One: service calls, contracts, customer equipment cards, and the knowledge base, exposed through the [SAP Business One Service Layer](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ONE_BRANCH) (OData).
key-features: Create and process service calls with activities and resolutions
Manage service contracts and contract templates
Query and extend the solutions knowledge base
